## H) What would change if applied

If this preview were applied in a future approved write phase:
- 1326 payment allocation links would be created.
- 1,853,420.00 would be linked from historical payments to obligations.
- 318,202.00 would remain unpaid across active obligations.
- Doctor overpayments of 8,095.00 would need account credit handling before any write.
- Supplier overpayments, settlement transactions, and issue settlement obligations would remain in manual review unless explicitly approved.

## I) Recommended next action

1. Review the manual review and high-risk sections first.
2. Exclude account-closing/dispute settlement payments from automatic FIFO allocation.
3. Decide the credit/settlement model before writing any historical payment allocations.
4. After approval, implement a separate write phase with batch limits, audit rows, and before/after protected-table checks.
